hooks.command:
echo '## Memex Memory System Active

### Recall
You have a Zettelkasten memory. When the user gives you a task, check if any cards below are relevant. If so, run `memex read <slug>` to get full context before starting.

### Retro
After completing a task, reflect: did you learn something worth remembering? If yes, write atomic cards using `memex write <slug>` (pipe via stdin). Before writing, `memex search` for existing cards to avoid duplicates. Link related cards with [[slug]] in prose. Card format:
```
---
title: <title>
created: <YYYY-MM-DD>
source: retro
---
<insight in own words, with [[links]] explaining relationships>
```

### Index' && memex read index 2>/dev/null || echo 'No memex index yet. Run /memex-organize to create one.'
